description: TaxMate Australia helps Australian users move from tax records to accountant-ready prep outputs with links to official ATO sources, GST/BAS and CGT triage, conservative treatment rules, and clear review flags.

defaultPrompt: Review these tax expenses conservatively for my accountant.
interface.longDescription: TaxMate Australia turns messy tax records into clear, conservative preparation workflows for Australian taxpayers, ABN operators, and accountant handoff. It combines ATO source-page refresh, GST/BAS and CGT triage, transaction review, calculator scaffolds, and output-focused skills (workbook and taxpack) on a bash and Python runtime. It supports Codex full-plugin workflows and portable skill use in Claude Code, Cowork, and OpenAgentSkill CLI. It is a preparation aid, not professional tax, legal, accounting, financial, BAS-agent, or registered-tax-agent advice, and is not affiliated with or endorsed by the Australian Taxation Office.
interface.shortDescription: Australian tax prep with ATO source links

name: taxmate-australia

safety.noLodgmentBoundary: Never lodge, file, submit, transmit, or finalise any tax return, BAS, form, statement, objection, election, payment instruction, or other material with the ATO or any government agency.
